name: Documentation Review Panel
description: Reviews documentation readiness and emits an aggregate panel state through a moderator.

members.responsibility: Aggregate reviewer state without injecting content judgment.

entry_conditions: Documentation artifacts exist or are required by the delivery
workflow: Documentation reviewer evaluates artifacts and emits findings.
Moderator determines whether the panel is complete and what aggregate state it should emit.
moderation_rule: The moderator may emit approve, conditional, or block at the panel-state level only. It must not originate documentation findings.
rework_routing: Documentation blocks route back to the originating pod or document writer.
